visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young girl with curly hair, wearing a lime yellow T-shirt dress with the words "ABSOLUTE HEAVEN," sits cross-legged on a light-colored wooden floor. She is actively folding bright blue floral patterned fabric and a pair of green shorts. The background features modern, light wood cabinetry and a soft fluorescent lighting strip on the ceiling. (2) An adult woman with long dark hair, wearing a white T-shirt with "HAHABABY" text, enters the frame from the right and kneels beside the girl. She presents a large stack of colorful children's picture books, spreading them out to show the covers to the girl and the camera. (3) The camera zooms in on a specific book titled "Where's Wally? Santa Spotlight Search." The woman demonstrates a black paper slider mechanic that illuminates characters behind a dark film. The girl leans in, watching the interactive element with focus and pointing at the page with her finger. (4) The scene cuts to a different set of books titled "真相推推推" (Truth Mystery). These books feature interactive flaps and sliding windows. The girl's small hands are shown pulling the tabs to reveal hidden illustrations underneath. The lighting remains bright, emphasizing the vibrant colors of the book illustrations. (5) A detailed demonstration of 3D pop-up books follows. An intricate paper model of a city with high-rise buildings and a rescue helicopter on a track pops up from the pages. The woman moves the helicopter along its path while the girl touches the raised cardboard structures curiously. (6) Both the woman and the child hold up several books towards the camera in a wide shot. Large yellow and pink text overlays appear on the screen, detailing promotional prices and gift bonuses. The woman gestures with her hand towards the top of the frame, smiling broadly.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 欸蔡咪，你怎麼在這裡折衣服. (2) [Variety]: 好無聊~. (3) [Subtitle]: 沒問題，我幫你準備一系列. [Variety]: 好玩又好看的書. (4) [Subtitle]: 姨我要選這個. (5) [Subtitle]: 欸你很懂選耶. (6) [Variety]: 《威力在哪裡》. (7) [Subtitle]: 最適合親子共讀的尋寶遊戲圖書書. (8) [Subtitle]: 全球暢銷超過6000萬本. (9) [Subtitle]: 結合了歷史地理文學電影等主題. (10) [Subtitle]: 在裡面尋找威力和他的朋友們. (11) [Subtitle]: 透過尋找遊戲來提升小朋友的觀察力和專注力. (12) [Subtitle]: 還有這幾本也很讚喔. (13) [Variety]: 《真相推推推》. (14) [Subtitle]: 有小學生最愛的真相推推推系列. (15) [Subtitle]: 結合互動機關和創意推理. (16) [Subtitle]: 大人小朋友都能化身為小小偵探解開謎團. (17) [Variety]: 《立體翻翻書》. (18) [Subtitle]: 身體好重要！眼睛好重要！安全好重要！. (19) [Subtitle]: 讓小朋友學習如何保護自己的身體、眼睛還有認識安全知識. (20) [Subtitle]: 像是地震來了的時候怎麼辦. (21) [Subtitle]: 欸蔡咪你看，他這一本裡面呢超過50個互動機關. (22) [Subtitle]: 你可以邊讀邊玩增加你的學習興趣. (23) [Subtitle]: 姨~我找到威力了. (24) [Subtitle]: 那麼厲害，那你想要再挑戰哪一本. (25) [Variety]: 小北鼻才選擇，我要全部!!. (26) [Subtitle]: 全部都給你!!. (27) [Slogan]: 現在我的團購優惠中. (28) [Slogan]: 有滿滿童書可以選哦!. (29) [Slogan]: 前100名下單滿3,999. (30) [Variety]: 《身體保護翻翻書》秘密派對. (31) [Subtitle]: 還送這一本身體保護翻翻書秘密派對. (32) [Subtitle]: 這一本呢我很推，要教育小朋友的身體自主權就要從小開始. (33) [Subtitle]: 那如果有興趣的話，我的首頁有連結可以去下單喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult female and 1 young girl are the main subjects.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The adult woman wears a white HAHABABY T-shirt and a long white skirt. The young girl wears a lime yellow T-shirt dress with curly hair tied with a purple bow.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor domestic setting with light-toned wooden flooring, light wood storage cabinets, and minimalist white walls.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A bright, mid-tempo electronic pop background track begins. An adult female voice speaks warmly, initiated by a sharp 'ding' sound effect. The BGM features a steady synth pulse and a clean electronic beat. (2) A young child's voice responds with a high pitch and playful cadence. A 'whoosh' transition sound effect punctuates the shift as the woman introduces the books. The BGM volume remains consistent in the background. (3) A professional adult male narrator's voice enters, speaking with high clarity and enthusiasm. A 'click' and 'sliding' SFX are heard as the spotlight slider in the book is demonstrated. The narrator's speech rate is moderately fast. (4) As the interactive 'Mystery' book appears, a whimsical 'sparkle' SFX plays. The narrator's voice modulates to a higher pitch when emphasizing the 'solve puzzles' feature. Audible 'paper rustling' occurs as the book's flaps are opened. (5) During the pop-up city demonstration, a 'mechanical sliding' sound effect accompanies the helicopter's movement. A 'boing' cartoon sound effect marks a playful interaction. The BGM maintains a major mode, sustaining an upbeat and educational atmosphere. (6) The woman's voice returns for the call to action, peaking in volume and arousal. A series of celebratory 'ding' sounds occur as promotional text is listed. The music swells slightly before cutting off abruptly at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Sequential Product Feature Showcase -> Value Proposition -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a strategic marketing promotion for a curated set of children's interactive books. By using a 'bored child' hook and demonstrating highly tactile book features (spotlights, flaps, 3D pop-ups), the creator appeals to parents looking for engaging educational materials. The video ends with a clear commercial incentive involving limited-time group-buy discounts and bonuses.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly mentions a 'group buy' (團購), provides pricing details, and directs viewers to a link in her profile bio to purchase the books.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows the standard 'Mom influencer' format common in Taiwan, utilizing high-energy narration and variety-show style editing to maintain viewer retention for product conversion.
